overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The character moves from a pawnshop plaza along graffiti-covered industrial walls, past neon billboards and trash-strewn alleys, and crosses a street at an intersection beneath elevated transit tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete plaza with pawnshop kiosk and scattered debris

events.description: moving away from the pawnshop kiosk into the open plaza area
passing the standing woman and beginning to follow the pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking away from the pawnshop along the concrete sidewalk, moving toward the street

notable_agents.action: woman in colorful outfit standing against the wall looking at her phone

entered.detail: small commercial booth with teal roof and yellow base, neon 'PAWNSHOP' signage
tall red metal wall with horizontal paneling running along the street
single palm tree in a concrete planter box
scattered paper, cardboard, and litter across the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a teal and yellow pawnshop kiosk in a concrete plaza. The camera follows a character walking past a woman standing against a red industrial wall, with trash scattered across the ground and a palm tree visible. The lighting is dim and moody with a mix of natural dusk and artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk along graffiti-covered industrial wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following the street, passing under overhead billboards

entered.detail: metal truss structure spanning across the street supporting digital billboards
large digital advertisement screen displaying red and orange graphics
vibrant spray paint murals in green, blue, and purple on the red wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk pressed against a long red industrial wall covered in colorful graffiti. Overhead, metal gantries hold glowing digital billboards that illuminate the path. The environment feels enclosed and urban, with the wall dominating the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with green building facade and trash accumulation

events.description: red graffiti wall ends and green industrial building facade begins

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past industrial trash bins and debris

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt standing near the green building wall holding a drink

entered.detail: multi-story building with green metal siding, air conditioning units, and orange window frames
wooden pallets, blue trash bags, cardboard boxes, and scattered garbage
green metal safety railing along the edge of a raised platform

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the red wall to a green industrial building covered in utility boxes and air conditioning units. The sidewalk is cluttered with trash bins, wooden pallets, and debris. A man stands against the green wall as the character passes by, approaching a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated transit tracks and vehicle traffic

events.description: vehicles pass on the street as the character approaches the crosswalk
character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating between vehicles

notable_agents.action: green van driving along the street through the intersection
dark sedan parked at the curb near the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure with red neon accent lighting underneath
paved asphalt road with yellow crosswalk lines and traffic signals
tall factory buildings and towers visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide urban intersection beneath massive elevated transit tracks illuminated with red neon lights. Vehicles including a green van drive along the street as the character crosses the road. The environment opens up from the narrow alley to reveal the broader cityscape with industrial buildings in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling urban intersection. It begins at a teal and yellow pawnshop kiosk in a concrete plaza, following a character past a woman leaning against a red industrial wall amidst scattered trash and a lone palm tree. As the character moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed, pressing against a long red wall covered in colorful graffiti while glowing digital billboards cast artificial light from overhead gantries. The scene then shifts as the red wall gives way to a green industrial building cluttered with utility boxes and debris, passing a man standing by the wall as the path leads toward the street. Finally, the narrow corridor expands into a wide intersection beneath massive elevated transit tracks illuminated with red neon, where the character crosses the road past a green van to reveal the broader cityscape and distant industrial buildings.
